scripts.test:list-layout: rm -rf .list-layout-test && tsc --outDir .list-layout-test --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/lib/layout/geometry.ts src/lib/layout/hierarchy.ts src/lib/layout/list-layout.ts src/lib/layout/list-layout.test.ts && node --test .list-layout-test/list-layout.test.js; status=$?; rm -rf .list-layout-test; exit $status
scripts.test:matrix-layout: rm -rf .matrix-layout-test && tsc --outDir .matrix-layout-test --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/lib/layout/geometry.ts src/lib/layout/hierarchy.ts src/lib/layout/matrix-layout.ts src/lib/layout/matrix-layout.test.ts && node --test .matrix-layout-test/matrix-layout.test.js; status=$?; rm -rf .matrix-layout-test; exit $status
scripts.test:canvas-geometry: rm -rf .canvas-geometry-test && tsc --outDir .canvas-geometry-test --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/lib/layout/geometry.ts src/lib/canvas/node-geometry.ts src/lib/canvas/shape-fitting.ts src/lib/canvas/grid-density.ts src/lib/canvas/shape-fitting.test.ts && node --test .canvas-geometry-test/canvas/shape-fitting.test.js; status=$?; rm -rf .canvas-geometry-test; exit $status
